examples.title: ETL Pipeline for E-Commerce Analytics
examples.description: Design ETL pipeline from transactional DB to analytics warehouse.

input.context: E-commerce platform. Source: PostgreSQL (orders, customers, products). Target: BigQuery analytics warehouse. Daily refresh by 06:00 UTC. ~10M orders/day. Need star schema with fact_orders and dim_customer, dim_product, dim_date.

expected_output.schema_table:
| Table | Type | Key Columns | Partition | Cluster | Tag |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| fact_orders | fact | order_id, customer_key, product_key, date_key | order_date (DAY) | customer_key | [GEN] |
| dim_customer | dimension | customer_key, customer_id | none | none | [GEN] |
| dim_product | dimension | product_key, product_id | none | category | [GEN] |
| dim_date | dimension | date_key, full_date | none | none | [GEN] |
expected_output.pipeline_stages:
| Stage | Type | Input | Output | Engine | SLA |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| extract_orders | extract | pg.orders | gs://raw/orders/ | Airflow + pg_dump | 30min [SPEC] |
| extract_customers | extract | pg.customers | gs://raw/customers/ | Airflow + pg_dump | 10min [SPEC] |
| transform_star | transform | gs://raw/* | bq.staging.* | dbt | 45min [SPEC] |
| quality_check | validate | bq.staging.* | quality_report | Great Expectations | 5min [SPEC] |
| load_marts | load | bq.staging.* | bq.analytics.* | dbt | 15min [SPEC] |

examples.title: Kafka Streaming Pipeline
examples.description: Design real-time event streaming for clickstream analytics.

input.context: Clickstream events from web app. ~50K events/sec peak. Need real-time sessionization and funnel analysis. Target: BigQuery for analytics, Redis for real-time dashboard.

expected_output.stream_comparison:
| Platform | Latency | Throughput | Guarantee | Cost/Mo | Tag |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Kafka + Flink | <100ms [SPEC] | 100K/s [GEN] | exactly_once | ~$800 [SPEC] | |
| Pub/Sub + Dataflow | <200ms [SPEC] | 100K/s [GEN] | at_least_once | ~$600 [SPEC] | |
| Kafka + Spark Streaming | <500ms [SPEC] | 100K/s [GEN] | at_least_once | ~$700 [SPEC] | |

examples.title: Schema Validation (Low Energy)
examples.description: Quick schema check for a new staging table.

input.context: New staging table for user signups. Columns: user_id (INT64), email (STRING), created_at (TIMESTAMP), plan_type (STRING). BigQuery.

expected_output.schema_table:
| Column | Type | Nullable | PII | Tag |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| user_id | INT64 | NO | No | [OBS] |
| email | STRING | NO | **YES** | [OBS] |
| created_at | TIMESTAMP | NO | No | [OBS] |
| plan_type | STRING | YES | No | [OBS] |
expected_output.notes: PII flag: email column. Recommend: hash or tokenize before loading to analytics layer [GEN]. Partition by DATE(created_at) if query patterns filter by date [GEN].
